creator: freebsd-sparc64@dan.me.uk
text:
Hi,

I'm not sure if this helps, but here goes...

I have just installed 7.0-RELEASE in an identical way to your original 
PR.  The system is an Ultra-60 dual 450mhz cpu, 2GB ram, dual 18GB SCSI 
disks.
I installed from the 7.0-RELEASE bootonly ISO, and used FTP install from 
ftp2.uk.freebsd.org.  I installed minimal distribution set only.

Prior to install, the system had a working copy of Solaris 10 with 
mirroring.

Install went through normally without any hangs.


Thanks,

Daniel.
